Operation 'parseImageUrl' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Enhanced AI agent interpretability by explaining when to use this endpoint (GET preference) versus parseImage (POST with file upload support).

data.current_summary: Parse image via URL (simplified GET endpoint)
data.current_description: Simplified OCR endpoint that only accepts image/PDF input via URL parameter. Useful for simple integrations where POST is not convenient.
data.summary_suggestion: Extract text from image or PDF via URL
data.description_suggestion: GET-based OCR endpoint for extracting text from images and PDFs provided via URL parameter. Accepts the same input formats and OCR options as the POST endpoint but with simplified integration for scenarios where GET requests are preferred. Returns extracted text and optional word-level coordinates. Supports 30+ languages and multiple OCR engines via query parameters.
data.reasoning: Original summary mentions implementation detail (GET endpoint) rather than the actual operation.
